_meta.schema: III ADR-003 §2 local learning store — ACCUMULATE writes target this file; canonical upstream (III.aDNA, md5 5adb0dfa38d9224649c3b2cba83852ae) is read-only from the consumer side
_meta.graduation: frequency>=3 across >=2 sessions + acceptance>=0.80 + Stanley/Argus gate (III ADR-003 §3)

summary: Producer input carries a human label per source (e.g. brief_consumer sources[].label) but the source degrades to a bare URL `link` node in the .canvas (baseline JSON Canvas link nodes have no anchor-text slot), so provenance is present in-spec yet renders as a bare URL with no visible label.
proposed_fix: Producer-side: emit an adjacent caption/text node carrying the label, or fold the label into _reserved.component_types[node].qualities.label; OR a Standard-side errata defining a link-label carry in _reserved. Do not force a label into the baseline link node.
note: Local candidate only (frequency 1). Surfaced during the first wired canvas review; feeds a brief/deck generator errata pass.
